# Security Policy

If you find a security vulnerability in this project, please do not open a public issue.

Instead, report it privately by email to `thatdaveguy1@users.noreply.github.com` with:

- a short description of the issue
- affected versions or commits
- clear reproduction steps
- any suggested mitigation if you have one

I will acknowledge the report as soon as I can and work on a fix before public disclosure.
